old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-06iw","title":"test_metrics.py violates test integrity rules","description":"Unit tests in python/tests/sim/test_metrics.py hardcode expected values (e.g. delivery_rate==1.5, collision_rate==2/3, specific latencies), directly access private attributes (_tx_start_times, _TX_START_TIMES_PRUNE_THRESHOLD), and use the Metrics implementation as its own oracle rather than independent test vectors, cross-impl validation, or reference path.
